BatchCreationOfPermissionGroupRules.ag_name: The name of the permission group for the rules to be created.
BatchCreationOfPermissionGroupRules.access_rules: List of permission group rules to be added in bulk; up to 100 rules can be created per request.
BatchCreationOfPermissionGroupRules.access_rules.ip: Authorized IP address (virtual VPC IP). Supports a single IP or a subnet combined with the mask parameter. Both IPv4 and IPv6 are supported, e.g., 10.10.1.123 or 2001::/16.
BatchCreationOfPermissionGroupRules.access_rules.mask: Used with the ip parameter to specify a subnet. Set to 32 for a single IPv4 address or 128 for a single IPv6 address.
BatchCreationOfPermissionGroupRules.access_rules.write_access: Read/write permission rule. Supported values: "read_only" for read-only access, "read_write" for read-write access.
BatchCreationOfPermissionGroupRules.access_rules.user_access: User permission rule. Supported values: "no_squash" to allow root without restriction, "root_squash" to restrict root user, "all_squash" to restrict all users.
BatchCreationOfPermissionGroupRules.access_rules.priority: Rule priority. Valid range is 1–100, where 1 is the highest priority.
